creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
After default installation of net/skype a normal user can not
	run the skype binary:
	-----
	h30% skype
	/usr/local/bin/skype: /usr/local/share/skype/skype: Permission denied
	h30% ls -ld /usr/local/share/skype
	drwx------  6 root  wheel  512 11 May 23:32 /usr/local/share/skype
	-----

Fix: 

Fix the directory permissions.

WBR
-- 
bsam
